name: Norman Connors
abstract: Norman Connors (born March 1, 1947) is an American jazz drummer, composer, arranger, and producer who has led a number of influential jazz and R&B groups. He also achieved several big R&B hits of the day, especially with love ballads.

about_quotes.speaker: Onaje Allan Gumbs
about_quotes.evidence: one of the people again who was a mentor of sorts was Norman Connors... commissioned me to do the title track of his second album... from there I went to work with him, about six months. So I’ve done about maybe five or six albums
about_quotes.doc_title: Onaje Allan Gumbs interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 12, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Hubert Laws
about_quotes.evidence: Norman Connors, who, when he hit, he had all these all-star bands, Ernie, yourself, everybody on them.
about_quotes.doc_title: Hubert Laws — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
